---
title: "Land use mean values"
author: "Andres Marmol"
date: "2026-02-19"
output: html_document
---

# getting the mean values for each land use period
```{r}
root_dir <- here("Project", "Atelopus niche modelling", "single_SDM", "input_data")
out_dir <- here("Project", "Atelopus niche modelling", "single_SDM", "input_data")
all_files <- list.files(
  root_dir,
  pattern = "._coverage_\\d{4}_lu_cat30\\.tif$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
# 2. Extract years and create a metadata data frame
file_meta <- data.frame(path = all_files) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(str_extract(basename(path), "\\d{4}")),
    period = case_when(
      year >= 1985 & year <= 1990 ~ "early",
      year >= 2018 & year <= 2021 ~ "late",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    ),
    period = trimws(tolower(as.character(period)))   # <-- add this
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(period))
```

```{r}
average_multiband_and_save <- function(metadata, period_label, years_text, outdir) {
  # 1. Ensure the output directory exists
  if (!dir.exists(outdir)) {
    dir.create(outdir, recursive = TRUE)
  }

  # 2. Filter paths for the specific period
  paths <- metadata$path[metadata$period == period_label]
  paths <- paths[!is.na(paths) & nzchar(paths)]
  if (length(paths) == 0) stop("No files found for period_label = '", period_label, "'.")

  # 3. Setup reference info
  ref_rast <- rast(paths[1])
  n_bands <- nlyr(ref_rast)
  band_names <- names(ref_rast)

  # --- complement: exclude the "not observed" band (robust) ---
  band_names_clean <- tolower(trimws(ifelse(is.na(band_names), "", band_names)))
  bands_to_use <- which(band_names_clean != "not observed")
  if (length(bands_to_use) == 0) stop("After removing 'not observed', no bands remain.")

  message("Processing ", length(paths), " files for ", years_text, "...")

  # 4. Loop through each band and average
  list_of_band_means <- lapply(bands_to_use, function(i) {
    band_stack <- rast(paths, lyrs = i)
    return(mean(band_stack, na.rm = TRUE))
  })

  # 5. Reassemble
  final_rast <- rast(list_of_band_means)
  names(final_rast) <- band_names[bands_to_use]

  # 6. Construct the full path using outdir
  output_filename <- paste0("land_use_Ecuador_", years_text, ".tif")
  output_path <- file.path(outdir, output_filename)

  # 7. Save with Compression
  writeRaster(
    final_rast,
    filename = output_path,
    overwrite = TRUE,
    datatype = "FLT4S",
    gdal = c("COMPRESS=DEFLATE")
  )

  message("Saved to: ", output_path)
  return(final_rast)
}
```

```{r}
# Execute for both periods
# Execute for both periods using the correct function name and providing out_dir
mean_85_90 <- average_multiband_and_save(file_meta, "early", "1985-1990", out_dir)
mean_18_21 <- average_multiband_and_save(file_meta, "late", "2018_2021", out_dir)
```
